summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) Strategic Program Manager who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing programs grounded in evidence, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can improve how teams adopt and deliver—through human-centered, data-driven approaches.

bullets.text: Manage end-to-end {prog|lifecycles} for 20+ concurrent projects, authoring SOPs and {coord|handoff documentation} to keep cross-functional delivery on track
Run technical working sessions and {prog|live onboarding} for 600+ participants, building resource libraries that cut onboarding time by 75%
Serve as primary liaison across {cross|Marketing, Tech, and Sales} and 10+ vendors, refining program positioning and delivery strategy
Facilitate listening sessions with 25 global {cross|stakeholders}, translating feedback into 3 new programs and a 78% enrollment rate
Facilitate CEO/HR discovery and stakeholder interviews to diagnose operational drivers and configure evidence-based process solutions
Conduct focus groups and 1:1 interviews with an NGO leadership team to resolve cross-functional process and accountability gaps
Led a manager effectiveness initiative, transforming {data|feedback data} into actionable reports that informed engagement strategies
Analyzed 2,000+ employee responses, reporting insights and recommending actions to the C-suite for {ex|adoption} of new programs
Provided consultations to improve strategic plans and internal training on DEI, Inclusive Leadership, and performance review
Improved {ex|stakeholder experience} via 5 {cross|cross-functional} projects focusing on survey development, rewards & recognition, and L&D
Optimized onboarding processes across 3 global locations by conducting process analysis and clarifying job responsibilities
Facilitated organizational change by directing a Merger & Acquisition project, migrating and merging employee records across systems
Streamlined immigration and relocation processes through close coordination with attorneys and {cross|cross-functional} teams
Piloted an Inclusive Leadership workshop for 12 senior leaders, later scaled to 23 global locations
Developed proficiency across various HR functions, ranging from recruitment and compensation to performance management
Filled a challenging international role by drafting job descriptions, posting openings, and researching global compensation details
Engaged global talent via personalized communication and customer service, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months
Organized recruiting events and moderated panels with C-suite at top 3 universities, reaching 230+ students and 80+ applicants

changeLog: 2026-05-30: Tailored for Anthropic — Implementation Specialist. Location → San Francisco, CA (role base). Summary → Strategic Program Manager, adoption/delivery flavor. InGenius → Set F (Ops/PM): end-to-end lifecycles, SOPs + handoff documentation, technical working sessions + onboarding, cross-functional liaison (Marketing/Tech/Sales) + vendors, 78% enrollment. Reordered InGenius to lead (most relevant). ODN → Pair B (diagnostic/process). Vestas → onboarding/process + M&A systems migration. Skills → dropped HRCI, led with PM + KM tools, added Claude to AI tools; trimmed LMS as not JD-relevant. NOTE: role is a deeply technical IdP/SSO/SCIM implementation role — genuine stretch; tailored to the truthful implementation/onboarding/runbook/enablement overlap only.
